title: Stack
description: A vertical flex container that arranges children in a column with consistent spacing. Ideal for vertical layouts.
summary: A vertical stack layout component for cleanly aligning elements with spacing.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `Stack` works.

<StackDemosUsage />

## Properties

Interactive configurator to explore customization options for the `Stack` component.

<StackDemosConfigurator />

## API References

### Styles API

| Styles API  | Type      | Default | Annotation                                    |
| ----------- | --------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| unstyled`?` | `boolean` | `false` | if `true`, all default styles will be removed |

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

<SourceCodes name="stack" />

`,(0,r.jsx)(n,{name:"stack",code:`import * as React from "react";\r
import { rem } from "xuxi";\r
import { cn } from "@/utils/cn";\r
\r
export interface StackProps extends React.ComponentProps<"div"> {\r
  unstyled?: string;\r
  gap?: string | number;\r
  align?: React.CSSProperties["alignItems"];\r
  justify?: React.CSSProperties["justifyContent"];\r
  style?: React.CSSProperties & { [key: string]: any };\r
}\r
export const Stack = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, StackProps>((_props, ref) => {\r
  const { gap = "12", align = "stretch", justify = "flex-start", unstyled, className, style, ...props } = _props;\r
  return (\r
    <div\r
      {...{\r
        ref,\r
        className: cn({ "flex flex-col max-w-full": !unstyled }, className),\r
        style: {\r
          gap: rem(gap),\r
          alignItems: align,\r
          justifyContent: justify,\r
          ...style\r
        } as React.CSSProperties,\r
        ...props\r
      }}\r
    />\r
  );\r
});\r
Stack.displayName = "Stack";`,ext:".tsx",repo:"web/components/stack.tsx"})]})}function f(t={}){let{wrapper:e}=t.components||{};return e?(0,r.jsx)(e,{...t,children:(0,r.jsx)(h,{...t})}):h(t)}function a(t,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+t+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return v(S);})();
